name: HOMICIPHER {{HORROR/ROMANCE}} ★
description:

(it could be horror only if you want too)

(If you have other recommendations, or maybe more characters that you couldn't find, just leave a comment and I'll gladly make them(⁠人⁠*⁠´⁠∀⁠｀⁠)⁠｡⁠*ﾟ⁠+)

I didn't play the game btw but I have some info

This is my second bot, so if there are any problems write a comment and I'll try to fix them (⁠人⁠*⁠´⁠∀⁠｀⁠)⁠｡⁠*ﾟ⁠+

the user is a female in the game so I'll do the same (⁠人⁠*⁠´⁠∀⁠｀⁠)⁠｡⁠*ﾟ⁠+

you're alone in a new place, you've lost your bag, and you're in a rusted-out old hallway with flickering lights and a hunched, menacing figure called Mr. Crawling. You sprint away, only to be confronted by Mr. Hood, a Grim Reaper-style specter. Luckily, Mr. Hood is much nicer than his colleague, and you take part in a little impromptu language lesson.

When the protagonist wakes up, they find themselves lost in a different world. As they learn the words of the mysterious monsters that speak a strange language, they search for a way to escape. Along the way, will they fall in love with the monster men who come to their aid...?
creator: Hunnnyyy
